hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); printf '%s | session=%s | branch=%s\n' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" "$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // "unknown"')" "$(git -C /Users/leonard/Workspace/leonard-garden/spring-saas-support-ai rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)" >> /Users/leonard/Workspace/leonard-garden/spring-saas-support-ai/.omc/session-log.txt
file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT"; if echo "$file" | grep -q '\.java$'; then echo '[hook] Java file modified — remember to run mvn test'; fi
